name: strigov-cc-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace maintained by Ian Strigov.

plugins.name: vassal-litigator-cc
plugins.description: Вассал (Claude Code edition): плагин для ведения судебных дел — intake материалов, каталогизация, правовой анализ, подготовка к заседаниям, обжалование. Использует vendored codex-companion runtime для файлового apply (medium), таймлайна (high), sidecar-визуализаций (image_gen) и контрольного ревью (xhigh). Форк vassal-litigator v0.5.4, адаптированный для Claude Code.

plugins.name: superpowers-strigov-ver
plugins.description: Personal fork of superpowers for strigov: multi-model dev orchestrator on the GPT-5.6 family — Sonnet main thread orchestrates (triage, dispatching, polling, git); Codex Sol max writes the plan (--effort ultra strictly user-initiated); Opus invoked as subagent for judgment (plan review loop cap=4, code review 4.1, escalation analysis); Codex Luna max implements with Terra xhigh as reasoning escalation; Codex Sol xhigh runs a control review on diffs after Opus review clears (fused loop cap=4). Reviewers consume a pre-baked review package (bin/review-package) and implementers report to files; a final whole-branch Opus review gates plan completion (cap=2). Sonnet verification gate (lint/typecheck/affected tests) runs before every review round; multi-round reviews are consolidated into docs/reviews/ by a synthesis step. Codex resumes are thread-addressed via the vendored companion's --resume-task extension. Plans are written to docs/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md with YAML frontmatter for cross-session resume. Auto-commits on clean review. Routes trivial edits to Sonnet quickfix subagent. Plus codex-invocation recipe, codex-ask (advisory second opinion), architecture-memory (ARCHI.md), and selected upstream skills (brainstorming, writing-plans, systematic-debugging, TDD, worktrees, verification-before-completion, finishing-a-development-branch, code-review flow, writing-skills, dispatching-parallel-agents).
